title: JaredH4
description:
JaredH4's Modpack for Building, Survival and Multiplayer.
Designed for Performance, Recording for YouTube and Classic Survival Minecraft.
body:
JaredH4's Modpack

This Modpack was made by JaredH4 as a Simple Vanilla Like Modpack. This Pack also runs Much More Smoothly Than Vanilla, with Optifine like features. You can join Most Survival/Creative Servers with this Modpack but PLEASE CHECK YOUR SERVER'S ALLOWED MODS first.
Note: Some servers may consider Camera Util's Camera Detaching cheating, if your server doesn't allow this mod you might want to remove it. I don't recommend joining Hypixel, Wynncraft or any pvp/minigame based servers with this pack.
If you would like to join Wynncraft, I recommend using my modpack, The Wynncraft Pack I recommend you add the Vanilla Tweaks resourcepack, here's the version I use: Vanilla Tweaks
